word: G4974 - σφυρόν - sphyrón - sfoo-ron' - Ancle bone

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter / பெயர்ச்சொல் (அஃறிணை)

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter of a presumed derivative probably of the same as σφαῖρα sphaira (a ball, “sphere”; compare the feminine σφῦρα sphura , a hammer); the ankle (as globular): - ancle bone.
